subcodes.first_line: That which thou didst submit hath been mentioned, with all its particulars, and whatsoever hath befallen thee is known at the Divine Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه معروض داشتید مذکور آمد جمیع تفاصیل و آنچه بر شما وارد شده لدی العرش
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
